evidence: 5715h indexes this table with (VV6F & 07h) * 5; 56CE-56D3 copies five bytes to EF7C..EF80 because uPD7810 BLOCK repeats until C underflows. FE1 at 09AC loads TM1 from EF7E + VV81 and wraps VV81 when it reaches VV7D.
notes: Third sequence byte is copied but not used while VV7D=02h.
Small dither around the 900 PPS interval; exact mode assignment depends on VV6F caller context.
